title: Q1 Invoice Reconciliation
description: Identified and resolved $4,200 discrepancy across 23 invoices. Found duplicate vendor charge from OfficeMax and drafted dispute with receipt attached.

title: Competitor Pricing Analysis
description: Pulled pricing data from 12 competitors. Two raised rates this month. Generated comparison table and recommended adjustments for Q2 positioning.
impact: Identified 20% pricing gap before competitors announced

title: Lease Renewal Proposals
description: Drafted 3 lease renewal proposals based on current market comps. Corrected underpriced Oak Street listing from $460K to $485K using 6 recent comparables.

title: Cold Lead Re-engagement
description: Identified 14 leads that went cold in 10 days. Built 3-email drip sequence using case study approach (3x better than discount offers). Flagged top 3 for personal calls.
